problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Constructed wetland for water filtration may resolve Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
